message:
test: add 35 proptest property tests + 11 cross-module integration tests

- proptest_agent_pane_state.rs (35 tests): classify() state machine,
  threshold boundaries, monotonicity, serde roundtrips, enum properties
- native_mux_reliability_harness sections 12-16 (35 new tests, 71 total):
  topology orchestration, topology+durable state, profile fleet+topology,
  command transport through topology, headless server+durable state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
